mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages ( post_id, user_id, content ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{content} )
mapper.select: SELECT cm.id, cm.post_id, cm.user_id, cm.content, cm.created_at, u.user_name, u.profile_image FROM chat_messages cm JOIN users u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.id = #{id}
SELECT cm.id, cm.post_id, cm.user_id, cm.content, cm.created_at, u.user_name, u.profile_image FROM chat_messages cm JOIN users u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY cm.id ASC
